5 ?71 1000000000 1

5 C 5 1111111111 a mismatch

5 I 7 0101000000 2 mismatch

5 I 1 1101000000 3 mismatch
5 I 1n 0010111111 7 mismatch

5 AND 71 0101000000 2 mismatch

7 I 3

Extending defaults
4 0011100000 3
5 1000000000 1
Starting at I 5 increasing
I 6 0010111010 partial 0001011010 4
I 7 0101000000 partial 1101000000 3
left 7
Starting at I 2 decreasing
I 1 1101000000 partial 0101000000 2
I 0 0001011010 partial 0010111010 5
right 7
Choosing left
4 I 6
5 I 7

Selected
0 I 2
1 I 3
2 I 4
3 I 5
4 XOR 60
5 XOR 71
6 I 2
7 I 3

Applying to 01110001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 2 = 1
1 I 3 = 1
2 I 4 = 0
3 I 5 = 0
4 XOR 60 = XOR(I 6,I 0) = XOR(0,0) = 0
5 XOR 71 = XOR(I 7,I 1) = XOR(1,1) = 0
6 I 2 = 1
7 I 3 = 1

\boxed{11000011}
